title: Spec ambiguity: signature field order vs MIC
description: spec/kiss-framing.md §3.3 diagram orders fields '...Payload, MIC, [Signature]' (signature after MIC), but implementations serialize signature appended to payload, BEFORE MIC (python link_layer.py:256 signed_payload = payload + signature; frame.py:135-141 ... + payload + mic). spec/02 §4.1 does not depict the signature field, so kiss-framing.md is the only document asserting an order and it contradicts the code. VERIFY which is authoritative; correct the diagram or the serialization (and any dissectors).
